title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
